generated_oml:
import DTDFVocab

instance GantryCraneActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "The gantry crane hardware together with its electronic controller that drives the mechanical motions of the trolley and hoist."
]

instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor that measures the horizontal position of the trolley on the gantry.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor that measures the speed of the trolley movement.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneLoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor that measures the load weight carried by the hoist.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LoadDataTransmitted
]

instance ControllerStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor that captures the current state of the crane controller (e.g., mode, error flags).",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerStateDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance SpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneSpeedSensor
]

instance LoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneLoadSensor
]

instance ControllerStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControllerStateSensor
]

instance PositionMeasurement : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped position value read from the crane trolley sensor.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance SpeedMeasurement : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped speed value of the trolley motion.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance LoadMeasurement : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped load weight measured by the hoist sensor.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LoadDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance ControllerStateRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped controller state snapshot (mode, errors, commands).",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time‑series database stores logged sensor data for long‑term analysis.",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker provides bi‑directional streaming between the physical crane and digital‑twin services.",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DockerContainerPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containers encapsulate the twin services and models for reproducible deployment.",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, OptimalControlService, HistoricalLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualises logged data and live crane state on a web‑based dashboard.",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD geometric model of the lab‑scale gantry crane created with open‑source CAD tools.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic behavioral model describing the motion constraints of the trolley and hoist.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal motion trajectories for the crane based on current position and load data.",
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runs a real‑time simulation of crane behaviour using the kinematic model.",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously validates simulation output against incoming sensor measurements triggers model recalibration on drift.",
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal control commands for the actuator to follow the generated trajectory.",
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuationCommandAction
]

instance HistoricalLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs all sensor measurements into TimescaleDB for long‑term storage and trend analysis.",
    DTDFVocab:provides LoggingInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides live visualisation of crane state and predicted trajectories via Grafana dashboards.",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendation of an optimal motion path for the crane based on current sensor context."
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Resulting simulated state of the crane for the proposed trajectory."
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of deviation between simulated and real measurements exceeding defined thresholds."
]

instance LoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation that sensor data has been successfully persisted in the time‑series database."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current crane position, speed, and load visualised together with predicted future states."
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command issued to the GantryCraneActuator to move trolley and operate hoist according to the optimal trajectory.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application, a Python program, uses the Physical Crane Interface to send motion commands (trajectory points, velocity set‑points) to the crane controllers. Operators can issue commands through the Human Machine Interface front‑end, which forwards them to the Control Application. Commands are transmitted over the same local interface used by the Physical Crane Interface (protocol not specified). The documents do not detail validation, authentication, or acknowledgment mechanisms, although the Continuous Validation Service monitors executed trajectories and raises alerts on the Grafana dashboard if deviations exceed a threshold."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system is orchestrated as a set of Docker‑containerised services coordinated via Docker Compose. Core components are: the Physical Crane, the Control Application (exposes REST/MQTT interfaces), the Logging Application (writes time‑stamped state to a TimescaleDB instance), the TimescaleDB database, the Grafana Dashboard for visualization, and the Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker that mediates messaging between Control, Logging and Validation services. Interaction logic is implemented in a Python library called gantrylib, which provides the twin’s behavioural model. All components run on a virtual machine and communicate over MQTT and HTTP."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The exemplar has been used to demonstrate continuous validation methods and fault‑detection approaches, indicating that model fidelity is monitored through ongoing validation against observed behaviour, though specific validation metrics or uncertainty quantification are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin components are organised as container‑style units that communicate via an MQTT broker for signalling and through direct connections to a TimescaleDB instance for data exchange. All containers run on a local network attached to the host that also connects to the physical crane controller. The documents provide no specifics on network topology, bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols for the communication links."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The gantry‑crane digital twin is deployed as a set of six containerised services (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, MQTT Broker) together with application containers (Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, Human Machine Interface). Deployment is on‑premise (presumably a single workstation or edge device); the provided documents do not mention cloud platforms, scalability mechanisms, or formal availability/reliability provisions."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "External integration is limited to GitHub for source code distribution and to standard open‑source tools. Data exchange uses MQTT (publish/subscribe) and SQL over TimescaleDB; visualization uses Grafana’s HTTP API. No proprietary enterprise systems or standards such as AutomationML are used."
]
